finding_results.notes: Theo now states all core terms once in full during the call, then the exchange pivots to feasibility pressure and consequence framing instead of re-listing terms. The follow-up text reinforces accountability stakes rather than repeating logistics language.

summary: Updated Chapter 15 dialogue cadence to eliminate contractual repetition, sharpen voice separation between Theo and Eli, and keep later mentions pressure-bearing while preserving continuity on transfer amounts, timing, and check-in structure.
